ops.title: flaky rpc: TestPostSendFailureIsNotReplayedAndNextCallReconnects misclassifies EOF as pre-send
ops.description: Intermittent in both workspace and GOWORK=off configs: 'first error = rpc transport pre-send-failure: wire: ... read: EOF, want post-send failure' (rpc_test.go:246). Failed CI run 29677330679 on a meshtrust-only diff (543861f4); green on rerun; locally GOWORK=off -count=25 reproduces. EOF-timing race in post-send failure classification — surfaced more often against local ../daemonkit HEAD, so it may bite hard on the next daemonkit bump.
